description: Verifies content safety via AI moderation (policy snapshot, bound to contentHash)

content.description: Moderation input. For images: base64 content or an IPFS reference (ipfs://<cid>). For text: raw UTF-8 text (size-limited).

contentType.description: MIME type. The server tolerates charset suffixes (e.g., "text/plain; charset=utf-8").

title: ai-content-moderation
